name: rlm_patterns
title: Recursive Language Model Patterns for Architecture Queries
description: RLM decomposition, multi-hop reasoning, context budgeting, query-focused retrieval, token allocation

test_cases.input: How should I decompose a complex architecture question for better answers?
How do I budget context tokens in a RAG pipeline with limited context window?
When should I use recursive decomposition instead of a single retrieval?
Compare RLM recursive approach to standard RAG for multi-topic queries
